case_title: CHOUKRI, KARIM et al VS FORD MOTOR COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,897.00 FILED BY CHOUKRI, KARIM AFR LIMOUSINE AND SEDAN SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY CT CORPORATION SYSTEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
